sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Boise Cascade Company fined $6M for role in timber trafficking scheme
feed.summary: Boise Cascade Company has been fined over $6 million for violating the Lacey Act by participating in a timber trafficking scheme. The company pleaded guilty to charges related to purchasing illegally imported hardwood plywood from Horizon Plywood, which had previously hidden the origin of its wood from China. The DOJ stated that Boise Cascade knew or should have known about the illegal importation, assisting in defrauding taxpayers and undermining legitimate businesses.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase (NYSE: JPM) offers callable notes due Oct 2034 at 4.825%
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. is offering $1.662 million in Callable Fixed Rate Notes due October 30, 2034, with an interest rate of 4.825% per annum. Interest payments will be made annually starting April 30, 2027. These notes are callable by JPMorgan on specified quarterly Redemption Dates from April 30, 2028, through July 30, 2034, posing reinvestment risk for investors if market rates decline.

feed.title: ConocoPhillips earnings up next: Can oil prices offset Qatar woes? By Investing.com
feed.summary: ConocoPhillips is set to report first-quarter earnings with analysts expecting a significant rebound despite production challenges from damaged Qatari gas facilities. The company's strong commodity leverage due to increased oil prices is expected to largely offset these disruptions. Investors will be watching how oil price strength balances against production impacts and updates to the shareholder return framework.

feed.title: $0.70 a share: Gallagher sets June 19 payout for investors
feed.summary: Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. (NYSE: AJG) has declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.70 per share. The dividend is payable on June 19, 2026, to stockholders of record as of June 5, 2026. Gallagher is a global insurance brokerage and risk-management firm operating in approximately 130 countries.

feed.title: Vanguard reports 32.47M Microchip shares (MCHP) — 6% stake
feed.summary: Vanguard Portfolio Management has reported a beneficial ownership of 32,469,341 shares of Microchip Technology Inc. (MCHP), constituting a 6% stake in the company as of March 31, 2026. The filing indicates Vanguard holds sole voting power for 63,962 shares and sole dispositive power for all 32,469,341 shares. The report was signed by Ashley Grim on April 29, 2026, confirming Vanguard's significant but passive investment in the semiconductor firm.

feed.title: Revvity stock hits 52-week low at 81.28 USD
feed.summary: Revvity Inc. (RVTY) stock has fallen to a new 52-week low of $81.28, reflecting a nearly 10% drop in the past week and an 11.84% year-to-date decline. Despite this, InvestingPro data suggests the stock might be undervalued. The company recently reported strong Q4 2025 financial results, surpassing revenue and EPS expectations, and analysts maintain generally positive ratings with price targets significantly above current levels.

feed.title: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals Inc Stock (REGN) Moved Down by 7.82% on Apr 29: Facts Behind the Movement
feed.summary: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals (REGN) stock dropped 7.82% despite strong Q1 2026 financial results, driven down by concerns over declining Eylea sales due to inventory and regulatory issues with its syringe, and the halt of an experimental lung cancer drug combination. Additionally, a False Claims Act complaint from the U.S. DOJ and near-term revenue uncertainty for its new gene therapy Otarmeni contributed to negative investor sentiment.

feed.title: [SCHEDULE 13G] MARKETAXESS HOLDINGS INC Passive Investment Disclosure (>5%)
feed.summary: Vanguard Portfolio Management has filed a Schedule 13G indicating beneficial ownership of 2,168,085 shares of MarketAxess Holdings Inc. (MKTX) Common Stock, which represents 6.09% of the class as of March 31, 2026. Vanguard holds sole dispositive power over all these shares and sole voting power for 4,414 shares. This filing is a passive investment disclosure, affirming that the shares were acquired for investment purposes and not to influence control of the issuer.

feed.title: Vanguard Portfolio Management (MAS) reports 6.07% stake in Masco Corp
feed.summary: Vanguard Portfolio Management has reported a 6.07% beneficial ownership stake in Masco Corp, totaling 12,376,808 shares as of March 31, 2026. This Schedule 13G filing indicates Vanguard has sole dispositive power over all these shares and sole voting power over 25,142 shares. The holdings include securities managed for Vanguard funds and client accounts.

feed.title: Vanguard Portfolio Management (NASDAQ: LKQ) holds 14.5M shares, 5.68% stake
feed.summary: Vanguard Portfolio Management has reported a beneficial ownership of 14,500,061 shares of LKQ Corp common stock, which represents a 5.68% stake in the company as of March 31, 2026. This Schedule 13G filing indicates a passive investment, with Vanguard exercising sole dispositive power over all shares and sole voting power over 113,475 shares. The holdings aggregate securities managed across various Vanguard affiliates and funds, not signifying an activist intent.

feed.title: NXPI - NXP Semiconductors NV Stock Price and Quote
feed.summary: This article provides a comprehensive overview of NXP Semiconductors NV (NXPI) stock, including its current price, financial metrics, analyst ratings, and recent news. It highlights the company's strong performance with Q1 2026 earnings beating estimates, a raised Q2 outlook, and reaffirmed long-term growth goals, leading to a significant stock price jump. The insider trading activity for NXP Semiconductors NV is also detailed.

feed.title: Vanguard Portfolio Management (MOH) reports 2.8M shares, 5.37% stake
feed.summary: Vanguard Portfolio Management has reported a beneficial ownership of 2,801,121 shares in Molina Healthcare Inc. (MOH), representing a 5.37% stake as of March 31, 2026. This Schedule 13G filing indicates a passive investment, with Vanguard having sole dispositive power over all these shares but sole voting power over only 10,150 shares. The filing underscores that this stake is held across various Vanguard funds and managed accounts, with no intention of influencing corporate control.

feed.title: Vanguard (MAA) reports 9.92M shares, 8.48% ownership (Schedule 13G)
feed.summary: Vanguard Portfolio Management has filed a Schedule 13G, disclosing a beneficial ownership of 9,921,408 shares in Mid-America Apartment Communities Inc. (MAA), representing 8.48% of the class as of March 31, 2026. The filing indicates Vanguard possesses sole dispositive power over all these shares but limited sole voting power for 14,081 shares. This disclosure, signed on April 29, 2026, includes holdings from Vanguard funds and managed accounts, and adheres to standard passive investor reporting guidelines.

feed.title: Vanguard Portfolio Management (NYSE: JBL) reports 5.09% ownership in Jabil
feed.summary: Vanguard Portfolio Management has disclosed a 5.09% beneficial ownership stake in Jabil Inc. (NYSE: JBL), holding 5,377,895 shares of common stock as of March 31, 2026. This Schedule 13G filing indicates a passive investment, with Vanguard retaining sole dispositive power over all shares and sole voting power for 23,682 shares. The stake is held on behalf of various Vanguard funds and managed accounts, reflecting typical fund-manager reporting.

feed.title: O’Reilly Automotive earnings on deck as same-store sales eyed
feed.summary: O’Reilly Automotive is set to release its first-quarter earnings, with analysts focusing on the auto parts retailer's ability to maintain pricing power and same-store sales growth amidst economic uncertainty. The company is expected to report increased earnings and revenue, driven by an aging U.S. vehicle fleet. Investors will closely watch same-store sales performance, margin pressures, and the company's full-year guidance.

feed.title: Vanguard Portfolio Management (NYSE: MSI) holds 5.83% — 9.66M shares disclosed
feed.summary: Vanguard Portfolio Management has disclosed a 5.83% stake in Motorola Solutions Inc. (MSI), totaling 9.66 million shares as of March 31, 2026. This ownership is reported through a Schedule 13G filing, indicating a passive investment. The filing also specifies Vanguard's sole voting power over 31,132 shares and sole dispositive power over all 9.66 million shares.

feed.title: Vanguard Portfolio Management (MSCI) discloses 4,038,129-share stake (5.52%)
feed.summary: Vanguard Portfolio Management has disclosed a passive beneficial ownership stake of 4,038,129 shares (5.52%) in MSCI Inc. as of March 31, 2026. This filing, a routine Schedule 13G, indicates that Vanguard holds these shares for its various funds and managed accounts, with sole dispositive power over all shares and limited sole voting power over 13,593 shares. The disclosure emphasizes that this is a passive investment, not intended to influence management, and provides transparency on institutional ownership.

feed.title: Vanguard (NASDAQ: MPWR) holds 2.53M shares, 5.14% stake
feed.summary: Vanguard Portfolio Management has reported a 5.14% ownership stake in Monolithic Power Systems Inc (MPWR), holding 2,528,928 shares. The Schedule 13G filing indicates Vanguard has sole dispositive power over all these shares, but only sole voting power over 12,436 shares. This filing provides transparency on significant ownership for investors.

feed.title: Vanguard Portfolio Management (MTB) reports 7.51M-share, 5.04% stake
feed.summary: Vanguard Portfolio Management has reported a 5.04% stake in M&T Bank Corp, holding 7,512,503 shares as of March 31, 2026. This Schedule 13G filing indicates Vanguard has sole dispositive power over all these shares and sole voting power for 23,966 shares, consistent with a passive institutional investment. The filing was signed by Ashley Grim, Head of Global Fund Administration, on April 29, 2026.

feed.title: Vanguard Portfolio Management (NYSE: LHX) reports 9.57M shares, 5.12% stake
feed.summary: Vanguard Portfolio Management has reported a beneficial ownership of 9,573,507 shares of L3Harris Technologies (LHX), representing a 5.12% stake in the company. The filing indicates that Vanguard holds sole voting power over 23,562 shares and sole dispositive power over all 9,573,507 shares. This disclosure, made via a Schedule 13G filing, attributes the holdings to Vanguard Portfolio Management LLC and its affiliated entities.

feed.title: Vanguard Portfolio Management holds 8.64M Keysight shares (KEYS)
feed.summary: Vanguard Portfolio Management has reported beneficial ownership of 8,638,464 shares (5.03%) in Keysight Technologies Inc (KEYS) as of March 31, 2026, according to a Schedule 13G SEC filing. This indicates a passive institutional investment, with Vanguard holding sole dispositive power over all these shares and sole voting power over 20,821 shares. The filing was signed on April 29, 2026, and includes holdings from various Vanguard funds and affiliates.

feed.title: ECS Transitions to Everforth ECS Amid ASGN Rebrand
feed.summary: ECS has officially changed its name to Everforth ECS, following the rebranding of its parent company, ASGN, to Everforth. This change unifies Everforth's business portfolio, enhancing its offerings in AI, cybersecurity, and enterprise IT modernization for defense, intelligence, and federal civilian agencies. The rebranding aims to provide expanded scale, specialized capabilities, and closer collaboration across the enterprise to meet complex mission challenges.

feed.title: Vanguard (NYSE: MLM) discloses 3.17M shares, 5.25% stake in Martin Marietta
feed.summary: Vanguard Portfolio Management has disclosed a 5.25% stake in Martin Marietta Materials Inc. (MLM), beneficially owning 3,167,718 shares as of March 31, 2026. The filing, a Schedule 13G, indicates a passive investment intent, with Vanguard affiliates exercising dispositive power over these shares. This disclosure provides transparency on institutional ownership in Martin Marietta.

feed.title: Vanguard Portfolio Management holds 8.42% in Iron Mountain (NYSE: IRM)
feed.summary: Vanguard Portfolio Management has filed a Schedule 13G, disclosing a beneficial ownership of 25,051,135 shares, or 8.42%, in Iron Mountain (NYSE: IRM). The filing indicates that Vanguard holds sole dispositive power over all these shares, but only sole voting power over 35,578 shares. This disclosure, dated April 29, 2026, was signed by Ashley Grim, Head of Global Fund Administration for Vanguard Portfolio Management.

feed.title: Quanta Services earnings in focus: Can AI power boom justify valuation?
feed.summary: Quanta Services is set to report its first-quarter earnings, with investors focused on whether its involvement in AI and data center infrastructure can justify its high valuation. Analysts anticipate earnings of $2.06 per share and revenue of $6.99 billion, despite recent cautious sentiment leading to slight declines in EPS and revenue estimates. The company's stock is trading near all-time highs, prompting scrutiny of its ability to convert its record backlog and execute on large-scale projects like the NiSource deal.

feed.title: Vanguard Portfolio Management (MPC) reports 5.35% ownership in Marathon Petroleum
feed.summary: Vanguard Portfolio Management has reported a 5.35% beneficial ownership in Marathon Petroleum (MPC), amounting to 15,765,266 shares as of March 31, 2026. This Schedule 13G filing indicates a passive investment position, with Vanguard exercising sole dispositive power over these shares and limited sole voting power of 93,153 shares. The filing clarifies that this does not signify an intent to control Marathon Petroleum.

feed.title: CHP seizes over $600,000 in stolen Home Depot tools in Southern California
feed.summary: The CHP Southern Division's Organized Retail Crime Task Force arrested two suspects involved in selling over $600,000 worth of stolen tools from various Home Depot stores across Southern California. The tools were allegedly resold at a Los Angeles County swap meet. Authorities recovered the merchandise during a search warrant served at the suspects' residence.

feed.title: ICE earnings on deck: Can record trading volumes justify expectations?
feed.summary: Intercontinental Exchange Inc. (ICE) is poised to report first-quarter earnings, with analysts expecting significant growth driven by record trading volumes, especially in commodities and interest rates, amidst geopolitical turmoil. Investors will be scrutinizing whether these unprecedented volumes translate into sustainable profitability, and how the company's Mortgage Technology segment performs given concerns about AI disruption. The report will assess if current expectations are justified despite the stock's recent underperformance relative to its 52-week high.

feed.title: MGM Resorts Faces Dining Shifts And Valuation Questions After Las Vegas Closures
feed.summary: MGM Resorts International is navigating significant dining operational changes in Las Vegas, including the bankruptcy of a food court operator at Circus Circus and the permanent closure of the MGM Grand Buffet. These shifts raise questions for investors about how the company will adapt its non-gaming offerings to evolving visitor habits given its current debt levels. The stock is currently trading below analyst targets but significantly below its estimated fair value by Simply Wall St.

feed.title: mRNA Treatment Market 2026 | Argos Therapeutics, Inc., CureVac AG, ethris GmbH, Moderna, Inc., Tiba Biotech etc.
feed.summary: The global mRNA treatment market is experiencing rapid growth, projected to expand from US$ 17.45 billion in 2025 to US$ 60.37 billion by 2034, driven by its success in infectious disease management and increasing applications in oncology and genetic medicine. Key factors include significant investments, rising prevalence of chronic diseases, and advancements in delivery systems like lipid nanoparticles. The market is highly competitive, with major players focusing on research, product development, and strategic partnerships, and North America currently leads in market share.

feed.title: Illinois Tool Works earnings ahead: Can margins stay elevated? By Investing.com
feed.summary: Illinois Tool Works (ITW) is set to release its first-quarter earnings, with analysts anticipating $2.57 EPS on $4.01 billion in revenue. Investors will focus on the company's ability to maintain high operating margins and pricing discipline amidst tepid revenue growth, especially given weakening volumes in some segments. Full-year guidance will be crucial, as the stock trades near its analyst consensus target with cautious sentiment.

feed.title: Walmart Inc. (WMT.US) Invests USD350M to Open Third Milk Processing Plant in US
feed.summary: Walmart Inc. (WMT.US) announced an investment of over USD350 million to establish its third milk processing plant in the United States. This new facility follows the opening of its first plant in Fort Wayne, Indiana, in 2018, and a second one in Valdosta, Georgia, in December of the previous year. The expansion underlines Walmart's continued focus on strengthening its dairy supply chain and production capabilities.

feed.title: NRC Renews License for Duke Energy (DUK)’s Robinson Nuclear Plant
feed.summary: The U.S. Nuclear Regulatory Commission has renewed the operating license for Duke Energy Corporation's H.B. Robinson Nuclear Plant for an additional 20 years, extending its life through 2050. This decision contributes to Duke Energy's ability to power approximately 570,000 homes. Analyst firms Morgan Stanley and Truist recently updated their ratings and price targets for Duke Energy, with Truist initiating coverage with a Buy rating due to the company's position to benefit from rising electricity demand from data centers.

feed.title: Stop the Rail Merger Coalition Launches to Oppose Union Pacific-Norfolk Southern Merger
feed.summary: A new "Stop the Rail Merger Coalition" has been formed to oppose the proposed merger between Union Pacific and Norfolk Southern rail lines. Comprising major railroad operators, customers, and workers, the coalition warns that the merger would reduce competition, increase costs for various industries and consumers, and create vulnerabilities in the supply chain. A national poll conducted by McLaughlin & Associates indicates that nearly 71% of Americans oppose the merger due to concerns about increased shipping costs, higher prices for goods, and potential job losses.

feed.title: Union Pacific Corporation (UNP): The Best Infrastructure Stock to Buy with Highest Upside Potential
feed.summary: Union Pacific Corporation (UNP) is highlighted as a top infrastructure stock with high upside potential, following positive analyst revisions from Raymond James and Benchmark. The company reported strong first-quarter earnings, beating consensus estimates for EPS while narrowly topping revenue expectations, and reaffirmed its 2026 outlook for mid-single-digit earnings growth and operational improvements. Analysts anticipate that service enhancements, network efficiency, and potential acquisitions will drive increased profitability and market position for Union Pacific.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Names Targa Resources (TRGP) a Top Pick
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has named Targa Resources (TRGP) its top pick in the midstream energy infrastructure sector, citing potential acceleration in Permian Basin gas production. Goldman Sachs also reiterated a Buy rating and raised its price target for TRGP due to strong sector performance and increasing natural gas demand. Targa Resources recently increased its quarterly dividend to $1.25 per share.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Upgrades Williams Companies (WMB) to Buy
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has upgraded The Williams Companies (WMB) to 'Buy' from 'Neutral' with an $82 price target, citing its strategically positioned Transcontinental Gas Pipeline. Analyst firms Jefferies and RBC Capital also maintained 'Buy' and 'Outperform' ratings, respectively, raising their price targets to $83 and $82. These upgrades are based on expectations of accelerated natural gas transmission project announcements and Williams' strong position to benefit from rising natural gas demand.

feed.title: ONEOK (OKE) Reports First-Quarter EPS of $1.23
feed.summary: ONEOK, Inc. (NYSE:OKE) reported first-quarter EPS of $1.23, falling short of consensus estimates but showing increased adjusted EBITDA. The company also raised its 2026 net income and adjusted EBITDA guidance, reflecting strong performance and an improved market outlook. Analysts at Scotiabank and Morgan Stanley have raised their price targets on OKE, maintaining Outperform and Overweight ratings, respectively.

feed.title: American Tower (AMT) Reports Q1 AFFO and Revenue Above Estimates
feed.summary: American Tower (NYSE:AMT) reported strong first-quarter results, with AFFO and revenue exceeding analyst expectations. The company also raised its full-year outlook, citing strong demand for digital infrastructure driven by mobile data usage, cloud adoption, and AI workloads. Mizuho upgraded American Tower to Outperform, noting that previous negatives appear priced in and highlighting improving tower fundamentals and an undervalued data center business.

feed.title: Barrick Mining says North American spinoff progressing
feed.summary: Barrick Mining plans to spin off its North American assets, including Nevada Gold Mines, into a new company by the end of 2026, aiming for an initial public offering primarily listed in New York. The new entity will have its own dedicated management team and aims to capitalize on significant growth potential from its roughly 2 million ounces of attributable gold production in 2025. Barrick is actively collaborating with Newmont Corp., its joint venture partner in Nevada Gold Mines, regarding the spinoff and potential inclusion of the Fourmile project.

feed.title: Better pairs home equity with a debit card, starting in summer 2026
feed.summary: Better Home & Finance Company announced the Better Home Equity Card, built on Stripe's financial infrastructure, that provides homeowners with prepaid debit access to funds drawn from a secured Better HELOC. This card aims to modernize how homeowners access their $21.4 trillion in tappable home equity, offering a more integrated and cost-effective solution compared to traditional, high-cost unsecured debt. The card will be offered to all approved Better HELOC customers as a disbursement method beginning in Summer 2026.

feed.title: Welltower (WELL) Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript
feed.summary: Welltower (WELL) reported record-breaking Q1 2026 results, with significant growth in revenue, adjusted EBITDA, and FFO per share, driven by a strategic shift towards senior housing operating assets. The company raised its full-year FFO guidance and highlighted successful capital recycling, substantial investment and disposition activities, and the monetization of its data science platform. Welltower emphasized its focus on operational excellence, data-driven insights, and strong partnerships to sustain long-term per-share growth.

feed.title: Boise Cascade bought illegally imported timber. Here’s the price it will pay
feed.summary: Boise Cascade has been fined over $6.3 million for illegally importing timber from China, a scheme designed to evade duties. The company pleaded guilty to a felony violation of the Lacey Act after knowingly purchasing over $30 million worth of hardwood plywood between 2018 and 2021 that was smuggled into the U.S. by another company. This fine amounts to twice the gross profits Boise Cascade gained, and shares tumbled over 6% following the news.

feed.title: UPS' Domestic and International Margins Still Pressured, but Cost Takeout on Track
feed.summary: UPS continues to face pressure on its domestic and international margins, though the company's cost reduction efforts are proceeding as planned. This analysis follows a recent earnings report where margins fell slightly short of expectations, yet guidance was reiterated. UPS has also recently divested its less-than-truckload division and truck brokerage unit as part of its "better, not bigger" strategy.

feed.title: A leading Mass. biotech company opened a much anticipated lab and processing space. Here's what it looks like.
feed.summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific, a prominent Massachusetts-based biotech company, has inaugurated a new, highly anticipated lab and processing facility. The article provides a visual tour of this new space, showcasing its appearance through several images.

feed.title: Raymond James raises Tradeweb stock price target on swap strength
feed.summary: Raymond James has raised its price target for Tradeweb Markets (NASDAQ:TW) to $156 from $147, while maintaining an Outperform rating. The firm highlights Tradeweb's diversified multi-asset class platform and strength in interest rate swaps as key revenue drivers, with the company achieving eleven consecutive quarters of over 10% year-over-year revenue growth. Despite a recent stock price decline following strong Q1 2026 earnings, InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock is undervalued, with an attractive risk/reward profile.

feed.title: Blackstone Invests €2 Billion in Renewables Developer Eurowind
feed.summary: Blackstone has announced an investment of up to €2 billion in Eurowind Energy, a Denmark-based renewable developer. This investment will give Blackstone a significant stake and is intended to accelerate Eurowind's renewable energy development across Europe, particularly in wind, solar, battery storage, and Power-to-X technologies. Norlys and the founders will retain majority ownership, while Blackstone's capital infusion will enable Eurowind to scale its portfolio and undertake larger, more complex projects to meet increasing European power demand.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Upgrades Williams Companies (WMB) to Buy
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs upgraded The Williams Companies Inc. (WMB) to "Buy" from "Neutral" with an $82 price target, citing its strategically positioned Transcontinental Gas Pipeline and expected acceleration in natural gas transmission projects. Jefferies and RBC Capital also raised their price targets on WMB, highlighting the company's strong position to benefit from rising natural gas and electricity demand with limited commodity price exposure. The article suggests that while WMB has potential, certain AI stocks might offer greater upside and less downside risk.

feed.title: Mohawk Industries earnings loom as analysts question volume outlook By Investing.com
feed.summary: Mohawk Industries is set to announce its first-quarter earnings, with analysts keenly focused on whether the flooring manufacturer can maintain its growth amid signs of weakening demand and rising costs. Despite a "Buy" rating from analysts with an implied 19% upside, recent downgrades from Baird and BofA Securities to "Hold" reflect growing skepticism about the company's volume trends, pricing power, and ability to offset input cost inflation. The report will be crucial in determining if the company can navigate a challenging operating environment.

feed.title: ONEOK (OKE) Reports First-Quarter EPS of $1.23
feed.summary: ONEOK (NYSE:OKE) reported first-quarter EPS of $1.23, missing analyst estimates, but saw adjusted EBITDA rise to $1.997 billion. The company raised its 2026 net income and adjusted EBITDA guidance, while maintaining capital spending projections. Scotiabank and Morgan Stanley recently increased their price targets for ONEOK, maintaining positive ratings.
